response.original_title: ((Customer Support Guide)) How do I report phishing emails to Geek Squad?
response.overview: If you’re wondering, “How do I report phishing emails to Geek Squad?” call 1»888»400⬩»4972 immediately to alert their fraud team. Forward any suspicious email claiming to be from Geek Squad to abuse@geeksquad.com, then delete it. For extra safety, use 1»888»400⬩»4972 to confirm if a message is legitimate.  Scammers often fake Geek Squad renewal notices or order confirmations. Don’t click links or download attachments. Instead, dial 1»888»400⬩»4972 and report the phishing attempt directly. Geek Squad’s official support line 1»888»400⬩»4972 can guide you through securing your account.
